revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q97576952]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:56, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:宮ノ前横穴墓群-2.jpg|thumb|250px|Kamakura-style of the {{ill|Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|宮ノ前横穴墓群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|qq=}}. Since most of the {{ill|Senshido|ja|羨道|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshido|qq=}} and {{ill|Genshitsu|ja|玄室|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshitsu|qq=}} at the front have collapsed, the inner "coffin chamber" is easily visible. '''Kamakura-style Tunnel Tomb''' (鎌倉型横穴墓) refers to a type of {{ill|Cave tomb|ja|横穴墓|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cave tomb|qq=}} constructed from the [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun Period]] to the early [[:en:Nara period|Nara Period]], found in the former {{ill|Kamakura District|ja|鎌倉郡|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamakura District|qq=}}—present-day [[:en:Kanagawa Prefecture|Kanagawa Prefecture]], [[:en:Kamakura|Kamakura City]], and their surrounding areas. It is characterized by having a “coffin chamber” excavated into the rear wall of the {{ill|Genshitsu|ja|玄室|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshitsu|qq=}}, and is also known as the “Kaji-ga-tani-style Tunnel Tomb.”
==Design== In Kanagawa Prefecture, many cave-type cemeteries—referred to as “Tunnel Tomb Clusters”—were constructed on mountainsides from the Kofun Period to the early Nara Period. The design known as the “Kamakura-style” is characterized by a mortuary passage (入口) leading from the {{ill|Senshido|ja|羨道|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshido|qq=}} into the burial chamber ({{ill|Genshitsu|ja|玄室|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshitsu|qq=}}), which features an elongated trapezoidal floor and a ceiling in the shape of a [[:en:Kamaboko|Kamaboko]]. In addition, a small room resembling a shelf, known as the “coffin chamber” (棺室), is excavated into the back wall.
Incidentally, during the [[:en:Kamakura period|Kamakura Period]], a rectangular cave-type cemetery known as a [[:en:Yagura (tombs)|Yagura]] was also built in Kamakura; however, there is no systematic relationship between the tunnel tombs and the yagura.<ref name="#1">栄区地域振興課『栄の歴史』（2013rd year ）20-21ページ</ref>
==Evolution of the Name== In the past, these tombs were frequently discovered in the basin of the {{ill|Kassakawa|ja|㹨川|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kassakawa|qq=}}, which flows through southeastern Kanagawa Prefecture, particularly in the area of [[:en:Yokohama|Yokohama City]] and [[:en:Sakae-ku, Yokohama|Sakae Ward]]. They were named after the local area {{ill|Kaji-ga-tani|ja|鍛冶ケ谷|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaji-ga-tani|qq=}}, being called “Kaji-ga-tani-style.” However, research conducted around 2004 (Heisei 16) revealed that these tombs are widespread mainly in the area centered on Kamakura City within the former {{ill|Kamakura District|ja|鎌倉郡|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamakura District|qq=}}, leading to the adoption of the name “Kamakura-style.”<ref name="#1"/><ref>埋蔵文化財センター（横浜市）『栄区の重要遺跡』（2015th year ）20-30ページ</ref>
==Examples of Kamakura-style Tunnel Tombs== * {{ill|Kassakawa Basin Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|㹨川流域横穴墓群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kassakawa Basin Tunnel Tomb Cluster|qq=}} ** {{ill|Nanasekiyama Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|七石山横穴墓群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nanasekiyama Tunnel Tomb Cluster|qq=}} ・ {{ill|Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|宮ノ前横穴墓群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|qq=}}<ref>埋蔵文化財センター（横浜市）『埋文よこはま31』（2015th year ）1-3ページ</ref>
==Books with Detailed Information== * {{ill|Kugenuma Girls' High School|ja|鵠沼女子高等学校|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kugenuma Girls' High School|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 鵠沼高等学校}} 地歴研究部 『横浜市戸塚区㹨川流域の横穴群について』1964th year （昭和39th year ）3月20日発行 * 神奈川県考古学会 『考古論叢神奈河 12集』（田村良照「相模の横穴墓」）2004th year （平成16th year ）4月発行 * {{ill|Yokohama City Buried Cultural Properties Center|ja|埋蔵文化財センター (横浜市)|lt=Yokohama City Buried Cultural Properties Center|lt_ja=埋蔵文化財センター（横浜市）|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokohama City Buried Cultural Properties Center|qq=}} 『[https://www.rekihaku.city.yokohama.jp/cms_files_maibun/pr_brochure/my031-hi.pdf 埋文よこはま31号（㹨川流域の横穴墓群）]』 2015th year （平成27th year ）3月20日発行
==Footnotes== {{Reflist}}
==References== * 栄の歴史編集委員会 『栄の歴史』 栄区地域振興課 2013rd year （平成25th year ）3月発行 * {{ill|Yokohama City Buried Cultural Properties Center|ja|埋蔵文化財センター (横浜市)|lt=Yokohama City Buried Cultural Properties Center|lt_ja=埋蔵文化財センター（横浜市）|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokohama City Buried Cultural Properties Center|qq=}} 『栄区の重要遺跡』 2015th year （平成27th year ）11月13日発行

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q97576952]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:16, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q97576952]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:56, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:宮ノ前横穴墓群-2.jpg|thumb|250px|Kamakura-style of the {{ill|Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|宮ノ前横穴墓群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|qq=}}. Since most of the {{ill|Senshido|ja|羨道|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshido|qq=}} and {{ill|Genshitsu|ja|玄室|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshitsu|qq=}} at the front have collapsed, the inner "coffin chamber" is easily visible. '''Kamakura-style Tunnel Tomb''' (鎌倉型横穴墓) refers to a type of {{ill|Cave tomb|ja|横穴墓|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cave tomb|qq=}} constructed from the [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun Period]] to the early [[:en:Nara period|Nara Period]], found in the former {{ill|Kamakura District|ja|鎌倉郡|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamakura District|qq=}}—present-day [[:en:Kanagawa Prefecture|Kanagawa Prefecture]], [[:en:Kamakura|Kamakura City]], and their surrounding areas. It is characterized by having a “coffin chamber” excavated into the rear wall of the {{ill|Genshitsu|ja|玄室|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshitsu|qq=}}, and is also known as the “Kaji-ga-tani-style Tunnel Tomb.”
==Design== In Kanagawa Prefecture, many cave-type cemeteries—referred to as “Tunnel Tomb Clusters”—were constructed on mountainsides from the Kofun Period to the early Nara Period. The design known as the “Kamakura-style” is characterized by a mortuary passage (入口) leading from the {{ill|Senshido|ja|羨道|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshido|qq=}} into the burial chamber ({{ill|Genshitsu|ja|玄室|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshitsu|qq=}}), which features an elongated trapezoidal floor and a ceiling in the shape of a [[:en:Kamaboko|Kamaboko]]. In addition, a small room resembling a shelf, known as the “coffin chamber” (棺室), is excavated into the back wall.
Incidentally, during the [[:en:Kamakura period|Kamakura Period]], a rectangular cave-type cemetery known as a [[:en:Yagura (tombs)|Yagura]] was also built in Kamakura; however, there is no systematic relationship between the tunnel tombs and the yagura.<ref name="#1">栄区地域振興課『栄の歴史』（2013rd year ）20-21ページ</ref>
==Evolution of the Name== In the past, these tombs were frequently discovered in the basin of the {{ill|Kassakawa|ja|㹨川|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kassakawa|qq=}}, which flows through southeastern Kanagawa Prefecture, particularly in the area of [[:en:Yokohama|Yokohama City]] and [[:en:Sakae-ku, Yokohama|Sakae Ward]]. They were named after the local area {{ill|Kaji-ga-tani|ja|鍛冶ケ谷|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaji-ga-tani|qq=}}, being called “Kaji-ga-tani-style.” However, research conducted around 2004 (Heisei 16) revealed that these tombs are widespread mainly in the area centered on Kamakura City within the former {{ill|Kamakura District|ja|鎌倉郡|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamakura District|qq=}}, leading to the adoption of the name “Kamakura-style.”<ref name="#1"/><ref>埋蔵文化財センター（横浜市）『栄区の重要遺跡』（2015th year ）20-30ページ</ref>
==Examples of Kamakura-style Tunnel Tombs== * {{ill|Kassakawa Basin Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|㹨川流域横穴墓群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kassakawa Basin Tunnel Tomb Cluster|qq=}} ** {{ill|Nanasekiyama Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|七石山横穴墓群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nanasekiyama Tunnel Tomb Cluster|qq=}} ・ {{ill|Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|宮ノ前横穴墓群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|qq=}}<ref>埋蔵文化財センター（横浜市）『埋文よこはま31』（2015th year ）1-3ページ</ref>
==Books with Detailed Information== * {{ill|Kugenuma Girls' High School|ja|鵠沼女子高等学校|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kugenuma Girls' High School|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 鵠沼高等学校}} 地歴研究部 『横浜市戸塚区㹨川流域の横穴群について』1964th year （昭和39th year ）3月20日発行 * 神奈川県考古学会 『考古論叢神奈河 12集』（田村良照「相模の横穴墓」）2004th year （平成16th year ）4月発行 * {{ill|Yokohama City Buried Cultural Properties Center|ja|埋蔵文化財センター (横浜市)|lt=Yokohama City Buried Cultural Properties Center|lt_ja=埋蔵文化財センター（横浜市）|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokohama City Buried Cultural Properties Center|qq=}} 『[https://www.rekihaku.city.yokohama.jp/cms_files_maibun/pr_brochure/my031-hi.pdf 埋文よこはま31号（㹨川流域の横穴墓群）]』 2015th year （平成27th year ）3月20日発行
==Footnotes== {{Reflist}}
==References== * 栄の歴史編集委員会 『栄の歴史』 栄区地域振興課 2013rd year （平成25th year ）3月発行 * {{ill|Yokohama City Buried Cultural Properties Center|ja|埋蔵文化財センター (横浜市)|lt=Yokohama City Buried Cultural Properties Center|lt_ja=埋蔵文化財センター（横浜市）|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokohama City Buried Cultural Properties Center|qq=}} 『栄区の重要遺跡』 2015th year （平成27th year ）11月13日発行
'''Kamakura-style Tunnel Tomb''' (鎌倉型横穴墓) *

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q97576952]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:16, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q97576952]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:56, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:宮ノ前横穴墓群-2.jpg|thumb|250px|Kamakura-style of the {{ill|Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|宮ノ前横穴墓群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|qq=|1=Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97613655}}. Since most of the {{ill|Senshido|ja|羨道|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshido|qq=|1=endō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11609923}} and {{ill|Genshitsu|ja|玄室|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshitsu|qq=}} at the front have collapsed, the inner "coffin chamber" is easily visible. '''Kamakura-style Tunnel Tomb''' (鎌倉型横穴墓) refers to a type of {{ill|Cave tomb|ja|横穴墓|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cave tomb|qq=}} constructed from the [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun Period]] to the early [[:en:Nara period|Nara Period]], found in the former {{ill|Kamakura District|ja|鎌倉郡|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamakura District|qq=|1=Kamakura District|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17175662}}—present-day [[:en:Kanagawa Prefecture|Kanagawa Prefecture]], [[:en:Kamakura|Kamakura City]], and their surrounding areas. It is characterized by having a “coffin chamber” excavated into the rear wall of the {{ill|Genshitsu|ja|玄室|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshitsu|qq=}}, and is also known as the “Kaji-ga-tani-style Tunnel Tomb.”
==Design== In Kanagawa Prefecture, many cave-type cemeteries—referred to as “Tunnel Tomb Clusters”—were constructed on mountainsides from the Kofun Period to the early Nara Period. The design known as the “Kamakura-style” is characterized by a mortuary passage (入口) leading from the {{ill|Senshido|ja|羨道|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshido|qq=|1=endō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11609923}} into the burial chamber ({{ill|Genshitsu|ja|玄室|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshitsu|qq=}}), which features an elongated trapezoidal floor and a ceiling in the shape of a [[:en:Kamaboko|Kamaboko]]. In addition, a small room resembling a shelf, known as the “coffin chamber” (棺室), is excavated into the back wall.
Incidentally, during the [[:en:Kamakura period|Kamakura Period]], a rectangular cave-type cemetery known as a [[:en:Yagura (tombs)|Yagura]] was also built in Kamakura; however, there is no systematic relationship between the tunnel tombs and the yagura.<ref name="#1">栄区地域振興課『栄の歴史』（2013rd year ）20-21ページ</ref>
==Evolution of the Name== In the past, these tombs were frequently discovered in the basin of the {{ill|Kassakawa|ja|㹨川|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kassakawa|qq=|1=Itachi River|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11259475}}, which flows through southeastern Kanagawa Prefecture, particularly in the area of [[:en:Yokohama|Yokohama City]] and [[:en:Sakae-ku, Yokohama|Sakae Ward]]. They were named after the local area {{ill|Kaji-ga-tani|ja|鍛冶ケ谷|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaji-ga-tani|qq=|1=Kajigaya|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11650738}}, being called “Kaji-ga-tani-style.” However, research conducted around 2004 (Heisei 16) revealed that these tombs are widespread mainly in the area centered on Kamakura City within the former {{ill|Kamakura District|ja|鎌倉郡|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamakura District|qq=|1=Kamakura District|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17175662}}, leading to the adoption of the name “Kamakura-style.”<ref name="#1"/><ref>埋蔵文化財センター（横浜市）『栄区の重要遺跡』（2015th year ）20-30ページ</ref>
==Examples of Kamakura-style Tunnel Tombs== * {{ill|Kassakawa Basin Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|㹨川流域横穴墓群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kassakawa Basin Tunnel Tomb Cluster|qq=|1=Itachigawa Basin Rock-Cut Tombs|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97576871}} ** {{ill|Nanasekiyama Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|七石山横穴墓群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nanasekiyama Tunnel Tomb Cluster|qq=|1=Shichisekiyama Cave Tomb Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11353656}} ・ {{ill|Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|宮ノ前横穴墓群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|qq=|1=Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97613655}}<ref>埋蔵文化財センター（横浜市）『埋文よこはま31』（2015th year ）1-3ページ</ref>

==Evolution of the Name== In the past, these tombs were frequently discovered in the basin of the {{ill|Kassakawa|ja|㹨川|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kassakawa|qq=|1=Itachi River|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11259475}}, which flows through southeastern Kanagawa Prefecture, particularly in the area of [[:en:Yokohama|Yokohama City]] and [[:en:Sakae-ku, Yokohama|Sakae Ward]]. They were named after the local area {{ill|Kaji-ga-tani|ja|鍛冶ケ谷|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaji-ga-tani|qq=|1=Kajigaya|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11650738}}, being called “Kaji-ga-tani-style.” However, research conducted around 2004 (Heisei 16) revealed that these tombs are widespread mainly in the area centered on Kamakura City within the former {{ill|Kamakura District|ja|鎌倉郡|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamakura District|qq=|1=Kamakura district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17175662}}, leading to the adoption of the name “Kamakura-style.”<ref name="#1"/><ref>埋蔵文化財センター（横浜市）『栄区の重要遺跡』（2015th year ）20-30ページ</ref>
==Examples of Kamakura-style Tunnel Tombs== * {{ill|Kassakawa Basin Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|㹨川流域横穴墓群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kassakawa Basin Tunnel Tomb Cluster|qq=|1=Itachigawa Basin Rock-Cut Tombs|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97576871}} ** {{ill|Nanasekiyama Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|七石山横穴墓群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nanasekiyama Tunnel Tomb Cluster|qq=|1=Shichisekiyama Cave Tomb Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11353656}} ・ {{ill|Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|宮ノ前横穴墓群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|qq=|1=Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97613655}}<ref>埋蔵文化財センター（横浜市）『埋文よこはま31』（2015th year ）1-3ページ</ref>
==Books with Detailed Information== * {{ill|Kugenuma Girls' High School|ja|鵠沼女子高等学校|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kugenuma Girls' High School|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 鵠沼高等学校|1=Kugenuma Girls' High School|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11675787}} 地歴研究部 『横浜市戸塚区㹨川流域の横穴群について』1964th year （昭和39th year ）3月20日発行 * 神奈川県考古学会 『考古論叢神奈河 12集』（田村良照「相模の横穴墓」）2004th year （平成16th year ）4月発行 * {{ill|Yokohama City Buried Cultural Properties Center|ja|埋蔵文化財センター (横浜市)|lt=Yokohama City Buried Cultural Properties Center|lt_ja=埋蔵文化財センター（横浜市）|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokohama City Buried Cultural Properties Center|qq=|1=Yokohama City Archaeological Research Center|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30929301}} 『[https://www.rekihaku.city.yokohama.jp/cms_files_maibun/pr_brochure/my031-hi.pdf 埋文よこはま31号（㹨川流域の横穴墓群）]』 2015th year （平成27th year ）3月20日発行

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:鎌倉型横穴墓]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q97576952]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:16, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q97576952]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:56, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:宮ノ前横穴墓群-2.jpg|thumb|250px|Kamakura-style of the {{ill|Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|宮ノ前横穴墓群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|qq=|1=Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97613655}}. Since most of the {{ill|Senshido|ja|羨道|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshido|qq=|1=endō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11609923}} and {{ill|Genshitsu|ja|玄室|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshitsu|qq=}} at the front have collapsed, the inner "coffin chamber" is easily visible. '''Kamakura-style Tunnel Tomb''' (鎌倉型横穴墓) refers to a type of {{ill|Cave tomb|ja|横穴墓|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cave tomb|qq=}} constructed from the [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun Period]] to the early [[:en:Nara period|Nara Period]], found in the former {{ill|Kamakura District|ja|鎌倉郡|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamakura District|qq=|1=Kamakura district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17175662}}—present-day [[:en:Kanagawa Prefecture|Kanagawa Prefecture]], [[:en:Kamakura|Kamakura City]], and their surrounding areas. It is characterized by having a “coffin chamber” excavated into the rear wall of the {{ill|Genshitsu|ja|玄室|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshitsu|qq=}}, and is also known as the “Kaji-ga-tani-style Tunnel Tomb.”
==Design== In Kanagawa Prefecture, many cave-type cemeteries—referred to as “Tunnel Tomb Clusters”—were constructed on mountainsides from the Kofun Period to the early Nara Period. The design known as the “Kamakura-style” is characterized by a mortuary passage (入口) leading from the {{ill|Senshido|ja|羨道|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshido|qq=|1=endō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11609923}} into the burial chamber ({{ill|Genshitsu|ja|玄室|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshitsu|qq=}}), which features an elongated trapezoidal floor and a ceiling in the shape of a [[:en:Kamaboko|Kamaboko]]. In addition, a small room resembling a shelf, known as the “coffin chamber” (棺室), is excavated into the back wall.
Incidentally, during the [[:en:Kamakura period|Kamakura Period]], a rectangular cave-type cemetery known as a [[:en:Yagura (tombs)|Yagura]] was also built in Kamakura; however, there is no systematic relationship between the tunnel tombs and the yagura.<ref name="#1">栄区地域振興課『栄の歴史』（2013rd year ）20-21ページ</ref>
==Evolution of the Name== In the past, these tombs were frequently discovered in the basin of the {{ill|Kassakawa|ja|㹨川|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kassakawa|qq=|1=Itachi River|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11259475}}, which flows through southeastern Kanagawa Prefecture, particularly in the area of [[:en:Yokohama|Yokohama City]] and [[:en:Sakae-ku, Yokohama|Sakae Ward]]. They were named after the local area {{ill|Kaji-ga-tani|ja|鍛冶ケ谷|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaji-ga-tani|qq=|1=Kajigaya|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11650738}}, being called “Kaji-ga-tani-style.” However, research conducted around 2004 (Heisei 16) revealed that these tombs are widespread mainly in the area centered on Kamakura City within the former {{ill|Kamakura District|ja|鎌倉郡|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamakura District|qq=|1=Kamakura district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17175662}}, leading to the adoption of the name “Kamakura-style.”<ref name="#1"/><ref>埋蔵文化財センター（横浜市）『栄区の重要遺跡』（2015th year ）20-30ページ</ref>
==Examples of Kamakura-style Tunnel Tombs== * {{ill|Kassakawa Basin Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|㹨川流域横穴墓群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kassakawa Basin Tunnel Tomb Cluster|qq=|1=Itachigawa Basin Rock-Cut Tombs|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97576871}} ** {{ill|Nanasekiyama Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|七石山横穴墓群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nanasekiyama Tunnel Tomb Cluster|qq=|1=Shichisekiyama Cave Tomb Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11353656}} ・ {{ill|Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|宮ノ前横穴墓群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|qq=|1=Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97613655}}<ref>埋蔵文化財センター（横浜市）『埋文よこはま31』（2015th year ）1-3ページ</ref>
==Books with Detailed Information== * {{ill|Kugenuma Girls' High School|ja|鵠沼女子高等学校|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kugenuma Girls' High School|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 鵠沼高等学校|1=Kugenuma Girls' High School|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11675787}} 地歴研究部 『横浜市戸塚区㹨川流域の横穴群について』1964th year （昭和39th year ）3月20日発行 * 神奈川県考古学会 『考古論叢神奈河 12集』（田村良照「相模の横穴墓」）2004th year （平成16th year ）4月発行 * {{ill|Yokohama City Buried Cultural Properties Center|ja|埋蔵文化財センター (横浜市)|lt=Yokohama City Buried Cultural Properties Center|lt_ja=埋蔵文化財センター（横浜市）|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokohama City Buried Cultural Properties Center|qq=|1=Yokohama City Archaeological Research Center|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30929301}} 『[https://www.rekihaku.city.yokohama.jp/cms_files_maibun/pr_brochure/my031-hi.pdf 埋文よこはま31号（㹨川流域の横穴墓群）]』 2015th year （平成27th year ）3月20日発行

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:鎌倉型横穴墓]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q97576952]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:16, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q97576952]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:56, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:宮ノ前横穴墓群-2.jpg|thumb|250px|Kamakura-style of the {{ill|Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|宮ノ前横穴墓群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|qq=|1=Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97613655}}. Since most of the {{ill|Senshido|ja|羨道|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshido|qq=|1=endō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11609923}} and {{ill|Genshitsu|ja|玄室|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshitsu|qq=}} at the front have collapsed, the inner "coffin chamber" is easily visible. '''Kamakura-style Tunnel Tomb''' (鎌倉型横穴墓) refers to a type of {{ill|Cave tomb|ja|横穴墓|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cave tomb|qq=}} constructed from the [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun Period]] to the early [[:en:Nara period|Nara Period]], found in the former {{ill|Kamakura District|ja|鎌倉郡|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamakura District|qq=|1=Kamakura district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17175662}}—present-day [[:en:Kanagawa Prefecture|Kanagawa Prefecture]], [[:en:Kamakura|Kamakura City]], and their surrounding areas. It is characterized by having a “coffin chamber” excavated into the rear wall of the {{ill|Genshitsu|ja|玄室|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshitsu|qq=}}, and is also known as the “Kaji-ga-tani-style Tunnel Tomb.”
==Design== In Kanagawa Prefecture, many cave-type cemeteries—referred to as “Tunnel Tomb Clusters”—were constructed on mountainsides from the Kofun Period to the early Nara Period. The design known as the “Kamakura-style” is characterized by a mortuary passage (入口) leading from the {{ill|Senshido|ja|羨道|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshido|qq=|1=endō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11609923}} into the burial chamber ({{ill|Genshitsu|ja|玄室|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshitsu|qq=}}), which features an elongated trapezoidal floor and a ceiling in the shape of a [[:en:Kamaboko|Kamaboko]]. In addition, a small room resembling a shelf, known as the “coffin chamber” (棺室), is excavated into the back wall.
Incidentally, during the [[:en:Kamakura period|Kamakura Period]], a rectangular cave-type cemetery known as a [[:en:Yagura (tombs)|Yagura]] was also built in Kamakura; however, there is no systematic relationship between the tunnel tombs and the yagura.<ref name="#1">栄区地域振興課『栄の歴史』（2013rd year ）20-21ページ</ref>
==Evolution of the Name== In the past, these tombs were frequently discovered in the basin of the {{ill|Kassakawa|ja|㹨川|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kassakawa|qq=|1=Itachi River|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11259475}}, which flows through southeastern Kanagawa Prefecture, particularly in the area of [[:en:Yokohama|Yokohama City]] and [[:en:Sakae-ku, Yokohama|Sakae Ward]]. They were named after the local area {{ill|Kaji-ga-tani|ja|鍛冶ケ谷|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaji-ga-tani|qq=|1=Kajigaya|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11650738}}, being called “Kaji-ga-tani-style.” However, research conducted around 2004 (Heisei 16) revealed that these tombs are widespread mainly in the area centered on Kamakura City within the former {{ill|Kamakura District|ja|鎌倉郡|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamakura District|qq=|1=Kamakura district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17175662}}, leading to the adoption of the name “Kamakura-style.”<ref name="#1"/><ref>埋蔵文化財センター（横浜市）『栄区の重要遺跡』（2015th year ）20-30ページ</ref>

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:鎌倉型横穴墓]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q97576952]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:16, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q97576952]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:56, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:宮ノ前横穴墓群-2.jpg|thumb|250px|Kamakura-style of the {{ill|Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|宮ノ前横穴墓群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|1=Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97613655}}. Since most of the {{ill|Senshido|ja|羨道|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshido|1=endō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11609923}} and {{ill|Genshitsu|ja|玄室|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshitsu|qq=}} at the front have collapsed, the inner "coffin chamber" is easily visible. '''Kamakura-style Tunnel Tomb''' (鎌倉型横穴墓) refers to a type of {{ill|Cave tomb|ja|横穴墓|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cave tomb|qq=}} constructed from the [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun Period]] to the early [[:en:Nara period|Nara Period]], found in the former {{ill|Kamakura District|ja|鎌倉郡|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamakura District|1=Kamakura district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17175662}}—present-day [[:en:Kanagawa Prefecture|Kanagawa Prefecture]], [[:en:Kamakura|Kamakura City]], and their surrounding areas. It is characterized by having a “coffin chamber” excavated into the rear wall of the {{ill|Genshitsu|ja|玄室|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshitsu|qq=}}, and is also known as the “Kaji-ga-tani-style Tunnel Tomb.”
==Design== In Kanagawa Prefecture, many cave-type cemeteries—referred to as “Tunnel Tomb Clusters”—were constructed on mountainsides from the Kofun Period to the early Nara Period. The design known as the “Kamakura-style” is characterized by a mortuary passage (入口) leading from the {{ill|Senshido|ja|羨道|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshido|1=endō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11609923}} into the burial chamber ({{ill|Genshitsu|ja|玄室|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshitsu|qq=}}), which features an elongated trapezoidal floor and a ceiling in the shape of a [[:en:Kamaboko|Kamaboko]]. In addition, a small room resembling a shelf, known as the “coffin chamber” (棺室), is excavated into the back wall.
Incidentally, during the [[:en:Kamakura period|Kamakura Period]], a rectangular cave-type cemetery known as a [[:en:Yagura (tombs)|Yagura]] was also built in Kamakura; however, there is no systematic relationship between the tunnel tombs and the yagura.<ref name="#1">栄区地域振興課『栄の歴史』（2013rd year ）20-21ページ</ref>
==Evolution of the Name== In the past, these tombs were frequently discovered in the basin of the {{ill|Kassakawa|ja|㹨川|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kassakawa|1=Itachi River|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11259475}}, which flows through southeastern Kanagawa Prefecture, particularly in the area of [[:en:Yokohama|Yokohama City]] and [[:en:Sakae-ku, Yokohama|Sakae Ward]]. They were named after the local area {{ill|Kaji-ga-tani|ja|鍛冶ケ谷|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaji-ga-tani|1=Kajigaya|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11650738}}, being called “Kaji-ga-tani-style.” However, research conducted around 2004 (Heisei 16) revealed that these tombs are widespread mainly in the area centered on Kamakura City within the former {{ill|Kamakura District|ja|鎌倉郡|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamakura District|1=Kamakura district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17175662}}, leading to the adoption of the name “Kamakura-style.”<ref name="#1"/><ref>埋蔵文化財センター（横浜市）『栄区の重要遺跡』（2015th year ）20-30ページ</ref>
==Examples of Kamakura-style Tunnel Tombs== * {{ill|Kassakawa Basin Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|㹨川流域横穴墓群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kassakawa Basin Tunnel Tomb Cluster|1=Itachigawa Basin Rock-Cut Tombs|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97576871}} ** {{ill|Nanasekiyama Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|七石山横穴墓群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nanasekiyama Tunnel Tomb Cluster|1=Shichisekiyama Cave Tomb Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11353656}} ・ {{ill|Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|宮ノ前横穴墓群|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|1=Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97613655}}<ref>埋蔵文化財センター（横浜市）『埋文よこはま31』（2015th year ）1-3ページ</ref>

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:鎌倉型横穴墓]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q97576952]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:16, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q97576952]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:56, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:宮ノ前横穴墓群-2.jpg|thumb|250px|Kamakura-style of the {{ill|Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|宮ノ前横穴墓群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|1=Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97613655}}. Since most of the {{ill|Senshido|ja|羨道|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshido|1=endō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11609923}} and {{ill|Genshitsu|ja|玄室|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshitsu|qq=}} at the front have collapsed, the inner "coffin chamber" is easily visible. '''Kamakura-style Tunnel Tomb''' (鎌倉型横穴墓) refers to a type of {{ill|Cave tomb|ja|横穴墓|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cave tomb|qq=}} constructed from the [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun Period]] to the early [[:en:Nara period|Nara Period]], found in the former {{ill|Kamakura District|ja|鎌倉郡|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamakura District|1=Kamakura district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17175662}}—present-day [[:en:Kanagawa Prefecture|Kanagawa Prefecture]], [[:en:Kamakura|Kamakura City]], and their surrounding areas. It is characterized by having a “coffin chamber” excavated into the rear wall of the {{ill|Genshitsu|ja|玄室|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshitsu|qq=}}, and is also known as the “Kaji-ga-tani-style Tunnel Tomb.”
==Design== In Kanagawa Prefecture, many cave-type cemeteries—referred to as “Tunnel Tomb Clusters”—were constructed on mountainsides from the Kofun Period to the early Nara Period. The design known as the “Kamakura-style” is characterized by a mortuary passage (入口) leading from the {{ill|Senshido|ja|羨道|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshido|1=endō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11609923}} into the burial chamber ({{ill|Genshitsu|ja|玄室|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshitsu|qq=}}), which features an elongated trapezoidal floor and a ceiling in the shape of a [[:en:Kamaboko|Kamaboko]]. In addition, a small room resembling a shelf, known as the “coffin chamber” (棺室), is excavated into the back wall.
Incidentally, during the [[:en:Kamakura period|Kamakura Period]], a rectangular cave-type cemetery known as a [[:en:Yagura (tombs)|Yagura]] was also built in Kamakura; however, there is no systematic relationship between the tunnel tombs and the yagura.<ref name="#1">栄区地域振興課『栄の歴史』（2013rd year ）20-21ページ</ref>
==Evolution of the Name== In the past, these tombs were frequently discovered in the basin of the {{ill|Kassakawa|ja|㹨川|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kassakawa|1=Itachi River|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11259475}}, which flows through southeastern Kanagawa Prefecture, particularly in the area of [[:en:Yokohama|Yokohama City]] and [[:en:Sakae-ku, Yokohama|Sakae Ward]]. They were named after the local area {{ill|Kaji-ga-tani|ja|鍛冶ケ谷|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaji-ga-tani|1=Kajigaya|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11650738}}, being called “Kaji-ga-tani-style.” However, research conducted around 2004 (Heisei 16) revealed that these tombs are widespread mainly in the area centered on Kamakura City within the former {{ill|Kamakura District|ja|鎌倉郡|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamakura District|1=Kamakura district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17175662}}, leading to the adoption of the name “Kamakura-style.”<ref name="#1"/><ref>埋蔵文化財センター（横浜市）『栄区の重要遺跡』（2015th year ）20-30ページ</ref>
==Examples of Kamakura-style Tunnel Tombs== * {{ill|Kassakawa Basin Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|㹨川流域横穴墓群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kassakawa Basin Tunnel Tomb Cluster|1=Itachigawa Basin Rock-Cut Tombs|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97576871}} ** {{ill|Nanasekiyama Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|七石山横穴墓群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nanasekiyama Tunnel Tomb Cluster|1=Shichisekiyama Cave Tomb Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11353656}} ・ {{ill|Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|宮ノ前横穴墓群|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|1=Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97613655}}<ref>埋蔵文化財センター（横浜市）『埋文よこはま31』（2015th year ）1-3ページ</ref>
==Books with Detailed Information== * {{ill|Kugenuma Girls' High School|ja|鵠沼女子高等学校|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kugenuma Girls' High School|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 鵠沼高等学校|1=Kugenuma Girls' High School|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11675787}} 地歴研究部 『横浜市戸塚区㹨川流域の横穴群について』1964th year （昭和39th year ）3月20日発行 * 神奈川県考古学会 『考古論叢神奈河 12集』（田村良照「相模の横穴墓」）2004th year （平成16th year ）4月発行 * {{ill|Yokohama City Buried Cultural Properties Center|ja|埋蔵文化財センター (横浜市)|lt=Yokohama City Buried Cultural Properties Center|lt_ja=埋蔵文化財センター（横浜市）|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokohama City Buried Cultural Properties Center|1=Yokohama City Archaeological Research Center|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30929301}} 『[https://www.rekihaku.city.yokohama.jp/cms_files_maibun/pr_brochure/my031-hi.pdf 埋文よこはま31号（㹨川流域の横穴墓群）]』 2015th year （平成27th year ）3月20日発行

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:鎌倉型横穴墓]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q97576952]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:16, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q97576952]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:56, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:宮ノ前横穴墓群-2.jpg|thumb|250px|Kamakura-style of the {{ill|Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|宮ノ前横穴墓群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|1=Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97613655}}. Since most of the {{ill|Senshido|ja|羨道|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshido|1=endō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11609923}} and {{ill|Genshitsu|ja|玄室|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshitsu|qq=}} at the front have collapsed, the inner "coffin chamber" is easily visible. '''Kamakura-style Tunnel Tomb''' (鎌倉型横穴墓) refers to a type of {{ill|Cave tomb|ja|横穴墓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cave tomb|qq=}} constructed from the [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun Period]] to the early [[:en:Nara period|Nara Period]], found in the former {{ill|Kamakura District|ja|鎌倉郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamakura District|1=Kamakura district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17175662}}—present-day [[:en:Kanagawa Prefecture|Kanagawa Prefecture]], [[:en:Kamakura|Kamakura City]], and their surrounding areas. It is characterized by having a “coffin chamber” excavated into the rear wall of the {{ill|Genshitsu|ja|玄室|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshitsu|qq=}}, and is also known as the “Kaji-ga-tani-style Tunnel Tomb.”
==Design== In Kanagawa Prefecture, many cave-type cemeteries—referred to as “Tunnel Tomb Clusters”—were constructed on mountainsides from the Kofun Period to the early Nara Period. The design known as the “Kamakura-style” is characterized by a mortuary passage (入口) leading from the {{ill|Senshido|ja|羨道|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshido|1=endō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11609923}} into the burial chamber ({{ill|Genshitsu|ja|玄室|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshitsu|qq=}}), which features an elongated trapezoidal floor and a ceiling in the shape of a [[:en:Kamaboko|Kamaboko]]. In addition, a small room resembling a shelf, known as the “coffin chamber” (棺室), is excavated into the back wall.
Incidentally, during the [[:en:Kamakura period|Kamakura Period]], a rectangular cave-type cemetery known as a [[:en:Yagura (tombs)|Yagura]] was also built in Kamakura; however, there is no systematic relationship between the tunnel tombs and the yagura.<ref name="#1">栄区地域振興課『栄の歴史』（2013rd year ）20-21ページ</ref>
==Evolution of the Name== In the past, these tombs were frequently discovered in the basin of the {{ill|Kassakawa|ja|㹨川|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kassakawa|1=Itachi River|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11259475}}, which flows through southeastern Kanagawa Prefecture, particularly in the area of [[:en:Yokohama|Yokohama City]] and [[:en:Sakae-ku, Yokohama|Sakae Ward]]. They were named after the local area {{ill|Kaji-ga-tani|ja|鍛冶ケ谷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaji-ga-tani|1=Kajigaya|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11650738}}, being called “Kaji-ga-tani-style.” However, research conducted around 2004 (Heisei 16) revealed that these tombs are widespread mainly in the area centered on Kamakura City within the former {{ill|Kamakura District|ja|鎌倉郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamakura District|1=Kamakura district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17175662}}, leading to the adoption of the name “Kamakura-style.”<ref name="#1"/><ref>埋蔵文化財センター（横浜市）『栄区の重要遺跡』（2015th year ）20-30ページ</ref>
==Examples of Kamakura-style Tunnel Tombs== * {{ill|Kassakawa Basin Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|㹨川流域横穴墓群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kassakawa Basin Tunnel Tomb Cluster|1=Itachigawa Basin Rock-Cut Tombs|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97576871}} ** {{ill|Nanasekiyama Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|七石山横穴墓群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nanasekiyama Tunnel Tomb Cluster|1=Shichisekiyama Cave Tomb Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11353656}} ・ {{ill|Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|宮ノ前横穴墓群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|1=Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97613655}}<ref>埋蔵文化財センター（横浜市）『埋文よこはま31』（2015th year ）1-3ページ</ref>

They were named after the local area {{ill|Kaji-ga-tani|ja|鍛冶ケ谷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaji-ga-tani|1=Kajigaya|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11650738}}, being called “Kaji-ga-tani-style.” However, research conducted around 2004 (Heisei 16) revealed that these tombs are widespread mainly in the area centered on Kamakura City within the former {{ill|Kamakura District|ja|鎌倉郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamakura District|1=Kamakura district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17175662}}, leading to the adoption of the name “Kamakura-style.”<ref name="#1"/><ref>埋蔵文化財センター（横浜市）『栄区の重要遺跡』（2015th year ）20-30ページ</ref>
==Examples of Kamakura-style Tunnel Tombs== * {{ill|Kassakawa Basin Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|㹨川流域横穴墓群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kassakawa Basin Tunnel Tomb Cluster|1=Itachigawa Basin Rock-Cut Tombs|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97576871}} ** {{ill|Nanasekiyama Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|七石山横穴墓群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nanasekiyama Tunnel Tomb Cluster|1=Shichisekiyama Cave Tomb Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11353656}} ・ {{ill|Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|宮ノ前横穴墓群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|1=Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97613655}}<ref>埋蔵文化財センター（横浜市）『埋文よこはま31』（2015th year ）1-3ページ</ref>
==Books with Detailed Information== * {{ill|Kugenuma Girls' High School|ja|鵠沼女子高等学校|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kugenuma Girls' High School|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 鵠沼高等学校|1=Kugenuma Girls' High School|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11675787}} 地歴研究部 『横浜市戸塚区㹨川流域の横穴群について』1964th year （昭和39th year ）3月20日発行 * 神奈川県考古学会 『考古論叢神奈河 12集』（田村良照「相模の横穴墓」）2004th year （平成16th year ）4月発行 * {{ill|Yokohama City Buried Cultural Properties Center|ja|埋蔵文化財センター (横浜市)|lt=Yokohama City Buried Cultural Properties Center|lt_ja=埋蔵文化財センター（横浜市）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokohama City Buried Cultural Properties Center|1=Yokohama City Archaeological Research Center|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30929301}} 『[https://www.rekihaku.city.yokohama.jp/cms_files_maibun/pr_brochure/my031-hi.pdf 埋文よこはま31号（㹨川流域の横穴墓群）]』 2015th year （平成27th year ）3月20日発行

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:鎌倉型横穴墓]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q97576952]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:16, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q97576952]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:56, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:宮ノ前横穴墓群-2.jpg|thumb|250px|Kamakura-style of the {{ill|Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|宮ノ前横穴墓群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|1=Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97613655}}]]. Since most of the {{ill|Senshido|ja|羨道|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshido|1=endō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11609923}} and {{ill|Genshitsu|ja|玄室|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshitsu|qq=}} at the front have collapsed, the inner "coffin chamber" is easily visible. '''Kamakura-style Tunnel Tomb''' (鎌倉型横穴墓) refers to a type of {{ill|Cave tomb|ja|横穴墓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cave tomb|qq=}} constructed from the [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun Period]] to the early [[:en:Nara period|Nara Period]], found in the former {{ill|Kamakura District|ja|鎌倉郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamakura District|1=Kamakura district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17175662}}—present-day [[:en:Kanagawa Prefecture|Kanagawa Prefecture]], [[:en:Kamakura|Kamakura City]], and their surrounding areas. It is characterized by having a “coffin chamber” excavated into the rear wall of the {{ill|Genshitsu|ja|玄室|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshitsu|qq=}}, and is also known as the “Kaji-ga-tani-style Tunnel Tomb.”
==Design== In Kanagawa Prefecture, many cave-type cemeteries—referred to as “Tunnel Tomb Clusters”—were constructed on mountainsides from the Kofun Period to the early Nara Period. The design known as the “Kamakura-style” is characterized by a mortuary passage (入口) leading from the {{ill|Senshido|ja|羨道|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshido|1=endō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11609923}} into the burial chamber ({{ill|Genshitsu|ja|玄室|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshitsu|qq=}}), which features an elongated trapezoidal floor and a ceiling in the shape of a [[:en:Kamaboko|Kamaboko]]. In addition, a small room resembling a shelf, known as the “coffin chamber” (棺室), is excavated into the back wall.
Incidentally, during the [[:en:Kamakura period|Kamakura Period]], a rectangular cave-type cemetery known as a [[:en:Yagura (tombs)|Yagura]] was also built in Kamakura; however, there is no systematic relationship between the tunnel tombs and the yagura.<ref name="#1">栄区地域振興課『栄の歴史』（2013rd year ）20-21ページ</ref>
==Evolution of the Name== In the past, these tombs were frequently discovered in the basin of the {{ill|Kassakawa|ja|㹨川|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kassakawa|1=Itachi River|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11259475}}, which flows through southeastern Kanagawa Prefecture, particularly in the area of [[:en:Yokohama|Yokohama City]] and [[:en:Sakae-ku, Yokohama|Sakae Ward]]. They were named after the local area {{ill|Kaji-ga-tani|ja|鍛冶ケ谷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaji-ga-tani|1=Kajigaya|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11650738}}, being called “Kaji-ga-tani-style.” However, research conducted around 2004 (Heisei 16) revealed that these tombs are widespread mainly in the area centered on Kamakura City within the former {{ill|Kamakura District|ja|鎌倉郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamakura District|1=Kamakura district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17175662}}, leading to the adoption of the name “Kamakura-style.”<ref name="#1"/><ref>埋蔵文化財センター（横浜市）『栄区の重要遺跡』（2015th year ）20-30ページ</ref>
==Examples of Kamakura-style Tunnel Tombs== * {{ill|Kassakawa Basin Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|㹨川流域横穴墓群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kassakawa Basin Tunnel Tomb Cluster|1=Itachigawa Basin Rock-Cut Tombs|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97576871}} ** {{ill|Nanasekiyama Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|七石山横穴墓群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nanasekiyama Tunnel Tomb Cluster|1=Shichisekiyama Cave Tomb Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11353656}} ・ {{ill|Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|宮ノ前横穴墓群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|1=Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97613655}}<ref>埋蔵文化財センター（横浜市）『埋文よこはま31』（2015th year ）1-3ページ</ref>
==Books with Detailed Information== * {{ill|Kugenuma Girls' High School|ja|鵠沼女子高等学校|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kugenuma Girls' High School|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 鵠沼高等学校|1=Kugenuma Girls' High School|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11675787}} 地歴研究部 『横浜市戸塚区㹨川流域の横穴群について』1964th year （昭和39th year ）3月20日発行 * 神奈川県考古学会 『考古論叢神奈河 12集』（田村良照「相模の横穴墓」）2004th year （平成16th year ）4月発行 * {{ill|Yokohama City Buried Cultural Properties Center|ja|埋蔵文化財センター (横浜市)|lt=Yokohama City Buried Cultural Properties Center|lt_ja=埋蔵文化財センター（横浜市）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokohama City Buried Cultural Properties Center|1=Yokohama City Archaeological Research Center|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30929301}} 『[https://www.rekihaku.city.yokohama.jp/cms_files_maibun/pr_brochure/my031-hi.pdf 埋文よこはま31号（㹨川流域の横穴墓群）]』 2015th year （平成27th year ）3月20日発行

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:鎌倉型横穴墓]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q97576952]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:16, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q97576952]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:56, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:宮ノ前横穴墓群-2.jpg|thumb|250px|Kamakura-style of the {{ill|Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|宮ノ前横穴墓群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|1=Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97613655}}]]. Since most of the {{ill|Senshido|ja|羨道|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshido|1=endō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11609923}} and {{ill|Genshitsu|ja|玄室|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshitsu|qq=}} at the front have collapsed, the inner "coffin chamber" is easily visible. '''Kamakura-style Tunnel Tomb''' (鎌倉型横穴墓) refers to a type of {{ill|Cave tomb|ja|横穴墓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cave tomb|qq=}} constructed from the [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun Period]] to the early [[:en:Nara period|Nara Period]], found in the former {{ill|Kamakura District|ja|鎌倉郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamakura District|1=Kamakura district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17175662}}—present-day [[:en:Kanagawa Prefecture|Kanagawa Prefecture]], [[:en:Kamakura|Kamakura City]], and their surrounding areas. It is characterized by having a “coffin chamber” excavated into the rear wall of the {{ill|Genshitsu|ja|玄室|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshitsu|qq=}}, and is also known as the “Kaji-ga-tani-style Tunnel Tomb.”
==Design== In Kanagawa Prefecture, many cave-type cemeteries—referred to as “Tunnel Tomb Clusters”—were constructed on mountainsides from the Kofun Period to the early Nara Period. The design known as the “Kamakura-style” is characterized by a mortuary passage (入口) leading from the {{ill|Senshido|ja|羨道|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshido|1=endō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11609923}} into the burial chamber ({{ill|Genshitsu|ja|玄室|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshitsu|qq=}}), which features an elongated trapezoidal floor and a ceiling in the shape of a [[:en:Kamaboko|Kamaboko]]. In addition, a small room resembling a shelf, known as the “coffin chamber” (棺室), is excavated into the back wall.
Incidentally, during the [[:en:Kamakura period|Kamakura Period]], a rectangular cave-type cemetery known as a [[:en:Yagura (tombs)|Yagura]] was also built in Kamakura; however, there is no systematic relationship between the tunnel tombs and the yagura.<ref name="#1">栄区地域振興課『栄の歴史』（2013rd year ）20-21ページ</ref>
==Evolution of the Name== In the past, these tombs were frequently discovered in the basin of the {{ill|Kassakawa|ja|㹨川|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kassakawa|1=Itachi River|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11259475}}, which flows through southeastern Kanagawa Prefecture, particularly in the area of [[:en:Yokohama|Yokohama City]] and [[:en:Sakae-ku, Yokohama|Sakae Ward]]. They were named after the local area {{ill|Kaji-ga-tani|ja|鍛冶ケ谷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaji-ga-tani|1=Kajigaya|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11650738}}, being called “Kaji-ga-tani-style.” However, research conducted around 2004 (Heisei 16) revealed that these tombs are widespread mainly in the area centered on Kamakura City within the former {{ill|Kamakura District|ja|鎌倉郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamakura District|1=Kamakura district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17175662}}, leading to the adoption of the name “Kamakura-style.”<ref name="#1"/><ref>埋蔵文化財センター（横浜市）『栄区の重要遺跡』（2015th year ）20-30ページ</ref>
==Examples of Kamakura-style Tunnel Tombs== * {{ill|Kassakawa Basin Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|㹨川流域横穴墓群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kassakawa Basin Tunnel Tomb Cluster|1=Itachigawa Basin Rock-Cut Tombs|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97576871}} ** {{ill|Nanasekiyama Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|七石山横穴墓群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nanasekiyama Tunnel Tomb Cluster|1=Shichisekiyama Cave Tomb Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11353656}} ・ {{ill|Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|宮ノ前横穴墓群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|1=Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97613655}}<ref>埋蔵文化財センター（横浜市）『埋文よこはま31』（2015th year ）1-3ページ</ref>
==Books with Detailed Information== * {{ill|Kugenuma Girls' High School|ja|鵠沼女子高等学校|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kugenuma Girls' High School|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 鵠沼高等学校|1=Kugenuma Girls' High School|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11675787}} 地歴研究部 『横浜市戸塚区㹨川流域の横穴群について』1964th year （昭和39th year ）3月20日発行 * 神奈川県考古学会 『考古論叢神奈河 12集』（田村良照「相模の横穴墓」）2004th year （平成16th year ）4月発行 * {{ill|Yokohama City Buried Cultural Properties Center|ja|埋蔵文化財センター (横浜市)|lt=Yokohama City Buried Cultural Properties Center|lt_ja=埋蔵文化財センター（横浜市）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokohama City Buried Cultural Properties Center|1=Yokohama City Archaeological Research Center|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30929301}} 『[https://www.rekihaku.city.yokohama.jp/cms_files_maibun/pr_brochure/my031-hi.pdf 埋文よこはま31号（㹨川流域の横穴墓群）]』 2015th year （平成27th year ）3月20日発行
==Footnotes== {{Reflist}}
==References== * 栄の歴史編集委員会 『栄の歴史』 栄区地域振興課 2013rd year （平成25th year ）3月発行 * {{ill|Yokohama City Buried Cultural Properties Center|ja|埋蔵文化財センター (横浜市)|lt=Yokohama City Buried Cultural Properties Center|lt_ja=埋蔵文化財センター（横浜市）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokohama City Buried Cultural Properties Center|1=Yokohama City Archaeological Research Center|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30929301}} 『栄区の重要遺跡』 2015th year （平成27th year ）11月13日発行

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:鎌倉型横穴墓]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q97576952]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:16, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q97576952]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:56, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:宮ノ前横穴墓群-2.jpg|thumb|250px|Kamakura-style of the {{ill|Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|宮ノ前横穴墓群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|1=Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97613655}}]]. Since most of the {{ill|Senshido|ja|羨道|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshido|1=endō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11609923}} and {{ill|Genshitsu|ja|玄室|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshitsu|qq=}} at the front have collapsed, the inner "coffin chamber" is easily visible. '''Kamakura-style Tunnel Tomb''' (鎌倉型横穴墓) refers to a type of {{ill|Cave tomb|ja|横穴墓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cave tomb|qq=}} constructed from the [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun Period]] to the early [[:en:Nara period|Nara Period]], found in the former {{ill|Kamakura District|ja|鎌倉郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamakura District|1=Kamakura district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17175662}}—present-day [[:en:Kanagawa Prefecture|Kanagawa Prefecture]], [[:en:Kamakura|Kamakura City]], and their surrounding areas. It is characterized by having a “coffin chamber” excavated into the rear wall of the {{ill|Genshitsu|ja|玄室|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshitsu|qq=}}, and is also known as the “Kaji-ga-tani-style Tunnel Tomb.”
==Design== In Kanagawa Prefecture, many cave-type cemeteries—referred to as “Tunnel Tomb Clusters”—were constructed on mountainsides from the Kofun Period to the early Nara Period. The design known as the “Kamakura-style” is characterized by a mortuary passage (入口) leading from the {{ill|Senshido|ja|羨道|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshido|1=endō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11609923}} into the burial chamber ({{ill|Genshitsu|ja|玄室|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshitsu|qq=}}), which features an elongated trapezoidal floor and a ceiling in the shape of a [[:en:Kamaboko|Kamaboko]]. In addition, a small room resembling a shelf, known as the “coffin chamber” (棺室), is excavated into the back wall.
Incidentally, during the [[:en:Kamakura period|Kamakura Period]], a rectangular cave-type cemetery known as a [[:en:Yagura (tombs)|Yagura]] was also built in Kamakura; however, there is no systematic relationship between the tunnel tombs and the yagura.<ref name="#1">栄区地域振興課『栄の歴史』（2013rd year ）20-21ページ</ref>
==Evolution of the Name== In the past, these tombs were frequently discovered in the basin of the {{ill|Kassakawa|ja|㹨川|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kassakawa|1=Itachi River|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11259475}}, which flows through southeastern Kanagawa Prefecture, particularly in the area of [[:en:Yokohama|Yokohama City]] and [[:en:Sakae-ku, Yokohama|Sakae Ward]]. They were named after the local area {{ill|Kaji-ga-tani|ja|鍛冶ケ谷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaji-ga-tani|1=Kajigaya|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11650738}}, being called “Kaji-ga-tani-style.” However, research conducted around 2004 (Heisei 16) revealed that these tombs are widespread mainly in the area centered on Kamakura City within the former {{ill|Kamakura District|ja|鎌倉郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamakura District|1=Kamakura district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17175662}}, leading to the adoption of the name “Kamakura-style.”<ref name="#1"/><ref>埋蔵文化財センター（横浜市）『栄区の重要遺跡』（2015th year ）20-30ページ</ref>
==Examples of Kamakura-style Tunnel Tombs== * {{ill|Kassakawa Basin Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|㹨川流域横穴墓群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kassakawa Basin Tunnel Tomb Cluster|1=Itachigawa Basin Rock-Cut Tombs|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97576871}} ** {{ill|Nanasekiyama Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|七石山横穴墓群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nanasekiyama Tunnel Tomb Cluster|1=Shichisekiyama Cave Tomb Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11353656}} ・ {{ill|Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|宮ノ前横穴墓群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|1=Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97613655}}<ref>埋蔵文化財センター（横浜市）『埋文よこはま31』（2015th year ）1-3ページ</ref>
==Books with Detailed Information== * {{ill|Kugenuma Girls' High School|ja|鵠沼女子高等学校|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kugenuma Girls' High School|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 鵠沼高等学校|1=Kugenuma Girls' High School|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11675787}} 地歴研究部 『横浜市戸塚区㹨川流域の横穴群について』1964th year （昭和39th year ）3月20日発行 * 神奈川県考古学会 『考古論叢神奈河 12集』（田村良照「相模の横穴墓」）2004th year （平成16th year ）4月発行 * {{ill|Yokohama City Buried Cultural Properties Center|ja|埋蔵文化財センター (横浜市)|lt=Yokohama City Buried Cultural Properties Center|lt_ja=埋蔵文化財センター（横浜市）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokohama City Buried Cultural Properties Center|1=Yokohama City Archaeological Research Center|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30929301}} 『[https://www.rekihaku.city.yokohama.jp/cms_files_maibun/pr_brochure/my031-hi.pdf 埋文よこはま31号（㹨川流域の横穴墓群）]』 2015th year （平成27th year ）3月20日発行

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:鎌倉型横穴墓]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q97576952]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:16, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q97576952]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:56, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:宮ノ前横穴墓群-2.jpg|thumb|250px|Kamakura-style of the {{ill|Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|宮ノ前横穴墓群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|1=Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97613655}}]]. Since most of the {{ill|Senshido|ja|羨道|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshido|1=endō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11609923}} and {{ill|Genshitsu|ja|玄室|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshitsu|qq=}} at the front have collapsed, the inner "coffin chamber" is easily visible. '''Kamakura-style Tunnel Tomb''' (鎌倉型横穴墓) refers to a type of {{ill|Cave tomb|ja|横穴墓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cave tomb|qq=}} constructed from the [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun Period]] to the early [[:en:Nara period|Nara Period]], found in the former {{ill|Kamakura District|ja|鎌倉郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamakura District|1=Kamakura district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17175662}}—present-day [[:en:Kanagawa Prefecture|Kanagawa Prefecture]], [[:en:Kamakura|Kamakura City]], and their surrounding areas. It is characterized by having a “coffin chamber” excavated into the rear wall of the {{ill|Genshitsu|ja|玄室|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshitsu|qq=}}, and is also known as the “Kaji-ga-tani-style Tunnel Tomb.”
==Design== In Kanagawa Prefecture, many cave-type cemeteries—referred to as “Tunnel Tomb Clusters”—were constructed on mountainsides from the Kofun Period to the early Nara Period. The design known as the “Kamakura-style” is characterized by a mortuary passage (入口) leading from the {{ill|Senshido|ja|羨道|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshido|1=endō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11609923}} into the burial chamber ({{ill|Genshitsu|ja|玄室|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshitsu|qq=}}), which features an elongated trapezoidal floor and a ceiling in the shape of a [[:en:Kamaboko|Kamaboko]]. In addition, a small room resembling a shelf, known as the “coffin chamber” (棺室), is excavated into the back wall.
Incidentally, during the [[:en:Kamakura period|Kamakura Period]], a rectangular cave-type cemetery known as a [[:en:Yagura (tombs)|Yagura]] was also built in Kamakura; however, there is no systematic relationship between the tunnel tombs and the yagura.<ref name="#1">栄区地域振興課『栄の歴史』（2013rd year ）20-21ページ</ref>
==Evolution of the Name== In the past, these tombs were frequently discovered in the basin of the {{ill|Kassakawa|ja|㹨川|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kassakawa|1=Itachi River|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11259475}}, which flows through southeastern Kanagawa Prefecture, particularly in the area of [[:en:Yokohama|Yokohama City]] and [[:en:Sakae-ku, Yokohama|Sakae Ward]]. They were named after the local area {{ill|Kaji-ga-tani|ja|鍛冶ケ谷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaji-ga-tani|1=Kajigaya|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11650738}}, being called “Kaji-ga-tani-style.” However, research conducted around 2004 (Heisei 16) revealed that these tombs are widespread mainly in the area centered on Kamakura City within the former {{ill|Kamakura District|ja|鎌倉郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamakura District|1=Kamakura district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17175662}}, leading to the adoption of the name “Kamakura-style.”<ref name="#1"/><ref>埋蔵文化財センター（横浜市）『栄区の重要遺跡』（2015th year ）20-30ページ</ref>
==Examples of Kamakura-style Tunnel Tombs== * {{ill|Kassakawa Basin Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|㹨川流域横穴墓群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kassakawa Basin Tunnel Tomb Cluster|1=Itachigawa Basin Rock-Cut Tombs|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97576871}} ** {{ill|Nanasekiyama Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|七石山横穴墓群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nanasekiyama Tunnel Tomb Cluster|1=Shichisekiyama Cave Tomb Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11353656}} ・ {{ill|Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|宮ノ前横穴墓群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|1=Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97613655}}<ref>埋蔵文化財センター（横浜市）『埋文よこはま31』（2015th year ）1-3ページ</ref>

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:鎌倉型横穴墓]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q97576952]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:16, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q97576952]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:56, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:宮ノ前横穴墓群-2.jpg|thumb|250px|Kamakura-style of the {{ill|Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|宮ノ前横穴墓群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|1=Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97613655}}]]. Since most of the {{ill|Senshido|ja|羨道|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshido|1=endō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11609923}} and {{ill|Genshitsu|ja|玄室|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshitsu|qq=}} at the front have collapsed, the inner "coffin chamber" is easily visible. '''Kamakura-style Tunnel Tomb''' (鎌倉型横穴墓) refers to a type of {{ill|Cave tomb|ja|横穴墓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cave tomb|qq=}} constructed from the [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun Period]] to the early [[:en:Nara period|Nara Period]], found in the former {{ill|Kamakura District|ja|鎌倉郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamakura District|1=Kamakura district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17175662}}—present-day [[:en:Kanagawa Prefecture|Kanagawa Prefecture]], [[:en:Kamakura|Kamakura City]], and their surrounding areas. It is characterized by having a “coffin chamber” excavated into the rear wall of the {{ill|Genshitsu|ja|玄室|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshitsu|qq=}}, and is also known as the “Kaji-ga-tani-style Tunnel Tomb.”
==Design== In Kanagawa Prefecture, many cave-type cemeteries—referred to as “Tunnel Tomb Clusters”—were constructed on mountainsides from the Kofun Period to the early Nara Period. The design known as the “Kamakura-style” is characterized by a mortuary passage (入口) leading from the {{ill|Senshido|ja|羨道|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshido|1=endō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11609923}} into the burial chamber ({{ill|Genshitsu|ja|玄室|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshitsu|qq=}}), which features an elongated trapezoidal floor and a ceiling in the shape of a [[:en:Kamaboko|Kamaboko]]. In addition, a small room resembling a shelf, known as the “coffin chamber” (棺室), is excavated into the back wall.
Incidentally, during the [[:en:Kamakura period|Kamakura Period]], a rectangular cave-type cemetery known as a [[:en:Yagura (tombs)|Yagura]] was also built in Kamakura; however, there is no systematic relationship between the tunnel tombs and the yagura.<ref name="#1">栄区地域振興課『栄の歴史』（2013rd year ）20-21ページ</ref>
==Evolution of the Name== In the past, these tombs were frequently discovered in the basin of the {{ill|Kassakawa|ja|㹨川|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kassakawa|1=Itachi River|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11259475}}, which flows through southeastern Kanagawa Prefecture, particularly in the area of [[:en:Yokohama|Yokohama City]] and [[:en:Sakae-ku, Yokohama|Sakae Ward]]. They were named after the local area {{ill|Kaji-ga-tani|ja|鍛冶ケ谷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaji-ga-tani|1=Kajigaya|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11650738}}, being called “Kaji-ga-tani-style.” However, research conducted around 2004 (Heisei 16) revealed that these tombs are widespread mainly in the area centered on Kamakura City within the former {{ill|Kamakura District|ja|鎌倉郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamakura District|1=Kamakura district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17175662}}, leading to the adoption of the name “Kamakura-style.”<ref name="#1"/><ref>埋蔵文化財センター（横浜市）『栄区の重要遺跡』（2015th year ）20-30ページ</ref>
==Examples of Kamakura-style Tunnel Tombs== * {{ill|Kassakawa Basin Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|㹨川流域横穴墓群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kassakawa Basin Tunnel Tomb Cluster|1=Itachigawa Basin Rock-Cut Tombs|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97576871}} ** {{ill|Nanasekiyama Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|七石山横穴墓群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nanasekiyama Tunnel Tomb Cluster|1=Shichisekiyama Cave Tomb Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11353656}} ・ {{ill|Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|宮ノ前横穴墓群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|1=Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97613655}}<ref>埋蔵文化財センター（横浜市）『埋文よこはま31』（2015th year ）1-3ページ</ref>

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]] to [[Category:qq]]{{wikidata link]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:鎌倉型横穴墓]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q97576952]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:16, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q97576952]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:56, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:宮ノ前横穴墓群-2.jpg|thumb|250px|Kamakura-style of the {{ill|Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|宮ノ前横穴墓群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|1=Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97613655}}]]. Since most of the {{ill|Senshido|ja|羨道|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshido|1=endō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11609923}} and {{ill|Genshitsu|ja|玄室|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshitsu|qq=}} at the front have collapsed, the inner "coffin chamber" is easily visible. '''Kamakura-style Tunnel Tomb''' (鎌倉型横穴墓) refers to a type of {{ill|Cave tomb|ja|横穴墓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cave tomb|qq=}} constructed from the [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun Period]] to the early [[:en:Nara period|Nara Period]], found in the former {{ill|Kamakura District|ja|鎌倉郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamakura District|1=Kamakura district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17175662}}—present-day [[:en:Kanagawa Prefecture|Kanagawa Prefecture]], [[:en:Kamakura|Kamakura City]], and their surrounding areas. It is characterized by having a “coffin chamber” excavated into the rear wall of the {{ill|Genshitsu|ja|玄室|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshitsu|qq=}}, and is also known as the “Kaji-ga-tani-style Tunnel Tomb.”
==Design== In Kanagawa Prefecture, many cave-type cemeteries—referred to as “Tunnel Tomb Clusters”—were constructed on mountainsides from the Kofun Period to the early Nara Period. The design known as the “Kamakura-style” is characterized by a mortuary passage (入口) leading from the {{ill|Senshido|ja|羨道|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshido|1=endō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11609923}} into the burial chamber ({{ill|Genshitsu|ja|玄室|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshitsu|qq=}}), which features an elongated trapezoidal floor and a ceiling in the shape of a [[:en:Kamaboko|Kamaboko]]. In addition, a small room resembling a shelf, known as the “coffin chamber” (棺室), is excavated into the back wall.
Incidentally, during the [[:en:Kamakura period|Kamakura Period]], a rectangular cave-type cemetery known as a [[:en:Yagura (tombs)|Yagura]] was also built in Kamakura; however, there is no systematic relationship between the tunnel tombs and the yagura.<ref name="#1">栄区地域振興課『栄の歴史』（2013rd year ）20-21ページ</ref>
==Evolution of the Name== In the past, these tombs were frequently discovered in the basin of the {{ill|Kassakawa|ja|㹨川|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kassakawa|1=Itachi River|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11259475}}, which flows through southeastern Kanagawa Prefecture, particularly in the area of [[:en:Yokohama|Yokohama City]] and [[:en:Sakae-ku, Yokohama|Sakae Ward]]. They were named after the local area {{ill|Kaji-ga-tani|ja|鍛冶ケ谷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaji-ga-tani|1=Kajigaya|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11650738}}, being called “Kaji-ga-tani-style.” However, research conducted around 2004 (Heisei 16) revealed that these tombs are widespread mainly in the area centered on Kamakura City within the former {{ill|Kamakura District|ja|鎌倉郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamakura District|1=Kamakura district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17175662}}, leading to the adoption of the name “Kamakura-style.”<ref name="#1"/><ref>埋蔵文化財センター（横浜市）『栄区の重要遺跡』（2015th year ）20-30ページ</ref>
==Examples of Kamakura-style Tunnel Tombs== * {{ill|Kassakawa Basin Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|㹨川流域横穴墓群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kassakawa Basin Tunnel Tomb Cluster|1=Itachigawa Basin Rock-Cut Tombs|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97576871}} ** {{ill|Nanasekiyama Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|七石山横穴墓群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nanasekiyama Tunnel Tomb Cluster|1=Shichisekiyama Cave Tomb Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11353656}} ・ {{ill|Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|宮ノ前横穴墓群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|1=Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97613655}}<ref>埋蔵文化財センター（横浜市）『埋文よこはま31』（2015th year ）1-3ページ</ref>
==Books with Detailed Information== * {{ill|Kugenuma Girls' High School|ja|鵠沼女子高等学校|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kugenuma Girls' High School|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 鵠沼高等学校|1=Kugenuma Girls' High School|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11675787}} 地歴研究部 『横浜市戸塚区㹨川流域の横穴群について』1964th year （昭和39th year ）3月20日発行 * 神奈川県考古学会 『考古論叢神奈河 12集』（田村良照「相模の横穴墓」）2004th year （平成16th year ）4月発行 * {{ill|Yokohama City Buried Cultural Properties Center|ja|埋蔵文化財センター (横浜市)|lt=Yokohama City Buried Cultural Properties Center|lt_ja=埋蔵文化財センター（横浜市）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokohama City Buried Cultural Properties Center|1=Yokohama City Archaeological Research Center|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30929301}} 『[https://www.rekihaku.city.yokohama.jp/cms_files_maibun/pr_brochure/my031-hi.pdf 埋文よこはま31号（㹨川流域の横穴墓群）]』 2015th year （平成27th year ）3月20日発行
==Footnotes== {{Reflist}}
==References== * 栄の歴史編集委員会 『栄の歴史』 栄区地域振興課 2013rd year （平成25th year ）3月発行 * {{ill|Yokohama City Buried Cultural Properties Center|ja|埋蔵文化財センター (横浜市)|lt=Yokohama City Buried Cultural Properties Center|lt_ja=埋蔵文化財センター（横浜市）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokohama City Buried Cultural Properties Center|1=Yokohama City Archaeological Research Center|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30929301}} 『栄区の重要遺跡』 2015th year （平成27th year ）11月13日発行

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:鎌倉型横穴墓]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q97576952]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:16, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q97576952]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:56, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:宮ノ前横穴墓群-2.jpg|thumb|250px|Kamakura-style of the {{ill|Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|宮ノ前横穴墓群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|1=Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97613655}}]]. Since most of the {{ill|Senshido|ja|羨道|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshido|1=endō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11609923}} and {{ill|Genshitsu|ja|玄室|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshitsu|qq=}} at the front have collapsed, the inner "coffin chamber" is easily visible. '''Kamakura-style Tunnel Tomb''' (鎌倉型横穴墓) refers to a type of {{ill|Cave tomb|ja|横穴墓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cave tomb|qq=}} constructed from the [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun Period]] to the early [[:en:Nara period|Nara Period]], found in the former {{ill|Kamakura District|ja|鎌倉郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamakura District|1=Kamakura district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17175662}}—present-day [[:en:Kanagawa Prefecture|Kanagawa Prefecture]], [[:en:Kamakura|Kamakura City]], and their surrounding areas. It is characterized by having a “coffin chamber” excavated into the rear wall of the {{ill|Genshitsu|ja|玄室|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshitsu|qq=}}, and is also known as the “Kaji-ga-tani-style Tunnel Tomb.”
==Design== In Kanagawa Prefecture, many cave-type cemeteries—referred to as “Tunnel Tomb Clusters”—were constructed on mountainsides from the Kofun Period to the early Nara Period. The design known as the “Kamakura-style” is characterized by a mortuary passage (入口) leading from the {{ill|Senshido|ja|羨道|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshido|1=endō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11609923}} into the burial chamber ({{ill|Genshitsu|ja|玄室|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genshitsu|qq=}}), which features an elongated trapezoidal floor and a ceiling in the shape of a [[:en:Kamaboko|Kamaboko]]. In addition, a small room resembling a shelf, known as the “coffin chamber” (棺室), is excavated into the back wall.
Incidentally, during the [[:en:Kamakura period|Kamakura Period]], a rectangular cave-type cemetery known as a [[:en:Yagura (tombs)|Yagura]] was also built in Kamakura; however, there is no systematic relationship between the tunnel tombs and the yagura.<ref name="#1">栄区地域振興課『栄の歴史』（2013rd year ）20-21ページ</ref>
==Evolution of the Name== In the past, these tombs were frequently discovered in the basin of the {{ill|Kassakawa|ja|㹨川|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kassakawa|1=Itachi River|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11259475}}, which flows through southeastern Kanagawa Prefecture, particularly in the area of [[:en:Yokohama|Yokohama City]] and [[:en:Sakae-ku, Yokohama|Sakae Ward]]. They were named after the local area {{ill|Kaji-ga-tani|ja|鍛冶ケ谷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaji-ga-tani|1=Kajigaya|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11650738}}, being called “Kaji-ga-tani-style.” However, research conducted around 2004 (Heisei 16) revealed that these tombs are widespread mainly in the area centered on Kamakura City within the former {{ill|Kamakura District|ja|鎌倉郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamakura District|1=Kamakura district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17175662}}, leading to the adoption of the name “Kamakura-style.”<ref name="#1"/><ref>埋蔵文化財センター（横浜市）『栄区の重要遺跡』（2015th year ）20-30ページ</ref>
==Examples of Kamakura-style Tunnel Tombs== * {{ill|Kassakawa Basin Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|㹨川流域横穴墓群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kassakawa Basin Tunnel Tomb Cluster|1=Itachigawa Basin Rock-Cut Tombs|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97576871}} ** {{ill|Nanasekiyama Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|七石山横穴墓群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nanasekiyama Tunnel Tomb Cluster|1=Shichisekiyama Cave Tomb Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11353656}} ・ {{ill|Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|ja|宮ノ前横穴墓群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|1=Miyanomae Tunnel Tomb Cluster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97613655}}<ref>埋蔵文化財センター（横浜市）『埋文よこはま31』（2015th year ）1-3ページ</ref>
==Books with Detailed Information== * {{ill|Kugenuma Girls' High School|ja|鵠沼女子高等学校|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kugenuma Girls' High School|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 鵠沼高等学校|1=Kugenuma Girls' High School|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11675787}} 地歴研究部 『横浜市戸塚区㹨川流域の横穴群について』1964th year （昭和39th year ）3月20日発行 * 神奈川県考古学会 『考古論叢神奈河 12集』（田村良照「相模の横穴墓」）2004th year （平成16th year ）4月発行 * {{ill|Yokohama City Buried Cultural Properties Center|ja|埋蔵文化財センター (横浜市)|lt=Yokohama City Buried Cultural Properties Center|lt_ja=埋蔵文化財センター（横浜市）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokohama City Buried Cultural Properties Center|1=Yokohama City Archaeological Research Center|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30929301}} 『[https://www.rekihaku.city.yokohama.jp/cms_files_maibun/pr_brochure/my031-hi.pdf 埋文よこはま31号（㹨川流域の横穴墓群）]』 2015th year （平成27th year ）3月20日発行
